This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

  3. Microsoft loses Brazilian court case after telling hacked Xbox user to re-purchase games — tech giant ordered to restore Xbox account with all games and pay $400 in damages  Tom's Hardware
  4. Xbox Gamer Wins Lawsuit Against Microsoft To Restore Account And Digital Library  Engadget
  5. Xbox Player Loses Thousands in Digital Games After Microsoft Deletes 25-Year-Old Account  VICE

item.title: 5 Windows 11 features from July’s update you shouldn’t overlook - PCWorld
item.description:
1. 5 Windows 11 features from July’s update you shouldn’t overlook  PCWorld
  2. I break down 6 new Windows 11 Insider features for July, including one that can save your PC  Windows Central
  3. Microsoft’s biggest ever patch Tuesday lets you hold off updating for longer  The Verge
  4. Microsoft cancels Patch Tuesday for some Dell users over surprise shutdowns, overheating devices  The Register
  5. More Stable, Less Annoying: A Massive Patch Tuesday Update Arrives Just When Windows Needs It  PCMag

item.title: Pro Jank Footy brings classic arcade chaos August 12 - PlayStation.Blog
item.description:
1. Pro Jank Footy brings classic arcade chaos August 12  PlayStation.Blog
  2. This Madcap, Chaotic Australian Football PS5 Game Is a Sports Title I Can Get Behind  Push Square
  3. Pro Jank Footy secures Nintendo Switch 2 and Switch release date, new trailer  Nintendo Everything
  4. Pro Jank Footy Looks Like A Game For A Fake Sport, But It's A Wacky Take On Aussie Rules Football  Gamer Matters
  5. Pro Jank Footy launches in August, floating DVD screensaver power-up and all  Games Asylum

item.description:

  2. Five Games Are Confirmed For Xbox Game Pass In August 2026 So Far  Pure Xbox

item.title: Apple’s M6 chip is coming soon, here’s everything we know - 9to5Mac
item.description:
1. Apple’s M6 chip is coming soon, here’s everything we know  9to5Mac
  2. Apple’s M6, M7 and M8 Chips Show How AI Is Reshaping the Company  Bloomberg.com
  3. Apple Is Reportedly Accelerating Chip Releases Due to AI Pressure  CNET
  4. Apple’s failed self-driving car program left a legacy of powerful AI chips  The Verge
  5. Apple’s M7 Ultra could take on Nvidia Blackwell with a staggering 1.5TB of memory  Yahoo Tech
